rationale: The assistant immediately brakes the requested N+1 manual gate, recognizes the Monday-Wednesday pattern of adding manual checks at downstream points, and reframes today's request as a symptom of upstream identification, handoff, or system-validation failure. It allows only a temporary emergency confirmer with explicit limits, refuses making it the new baseline, requires anomaly-source recording, and pushes to upstream structural repair by Friday. This meets the anti-spiral intent despite not using the exact words subtraction/consolidation/automation.
